\tzpentry{ID4444}{Lattice Spectral Gap Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4444 introduces Lattice Spectral Gap Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\Delta_{\text{lattice}} = \sqrt{\frac{4\pi R^2}{N_{\text{nodes}}} \cdot \chi_T} \equiv \ell_P \cdot \exp\left( \frac{1}{\alpha_T} \right)$$
